LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF HARMONY VILLANDRY'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 3, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302. NO APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED IF THE COURT HAS SIGNED AN ORDER REGARDING THIS MATTER PRIOR TO 2/3/15. THE COURT IS INCLINED TO GRANT PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS ACTION SETTLEMENT. HOWEVER, THE COURT IS INCLINED TO ONLY AWARD ATTORNEY'S FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF 25% OF THE SETTLEMENT AMOUNT, AND NOT THE ONE-THIRD PERCENT REQUESTED BY COUNSEL. THE COURT WILL ALLOW PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT TIMESHEETS REGARDING THE ISSUE OF ATTORNEY'S FEES. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. THE SECTION ON THE PROPOSED ORDER REGARDING ATTORNEY'S FEES MAY BE LEFT BLANK. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: SHERYL L. SAWYER, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Final Fairness And Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Final Fairness And Final Approval Hearing is taken off calendar; duplicate entry. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Louis M. Benowitz, of Law Offices of Louis Benowitz, Tel. 310.844.5141, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Tyreen G. Torner, of Fox Rothschild LLP, Tel. 415.364.5540, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF HARMONY VILLANDRY'S Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement is taken off calendar; duplicate entry. (D302)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LOUIS M. BENOWITZ, Tel No. (310) 844-5141 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. TYREEN G. TORNER of Fox Rothschild, LLP, Tel No. (415) 364-5540 appearing telephonically for the Defendant.

RULING - The Court and counsel discussed counsel's requests for clarification. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF HARMONY VILLANDRY, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF AND ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. The Court approves $80,000.00 in attorney's fees. The Court sets a Final Approval of Class Action Settlement Hearing for Wednesday, June 17, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Jan-02-2015 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LOUIS M. BENOWITZ, Tel No. (310) 844-5141 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
Atty. TYREEN G. TORNER of Fox Rothschild, LLP, Tel No. (415) 364-5540 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - PLAINTIFF HARMONY VILLANDRY'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued to February 3, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. No appearances are required if the court has signed an order regarding this matter prior to 2/3/15. The Court is inclined to grant Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Approval of Class Action Settlement. However, the court is inclined to only award attorney's fees in the amount of 25% of the settlement amount, and not the one-third percent requested by counsel. The Court will allow Plaintiff's counsel to submit timesheets regarding the issue of attorney's fees. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order. The section on the proposed order regarding attorney's fees may be left blank. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement

Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
